extra.reason: Done: npm ci completed with warmed/prefer-offline cache, Prisma generation made explicit for full/smoke tests, local setup documented. Verified npm test and npm run build pass.
Done: added .github/workflows/ci.yml with npm ci, npm test, npm run build. Omitted npm run lint because next lint is interactive/deprecated until ESLint is configured.
Done: replaced Docker startup db push workaround with prisma migrate deploy && npm start; documented one-time legacy baseline recovery in docs/DEPLOYMENT_MIGRATIONS.md and deploy instructions.

Done: documented Prisma v6 pool parameters and deployment sizing checklist in docs/PRISMA_POOLING.md; updated .env.example with explicit connection_limit, pool_timeout, connect_timeout. Verified npm test and npm run build pass sequentially.

Done: auth layout already exposes privacy/terms links; email registration already required termsAccepted; tightened phone OTP registration to require current termsAccepted on verify and send the actual checkbox value. Verified npm test and npm run build pass.
Already satisfied: registration city field is a select populated from /api/public/cities, with Санкт-Петербург fallback. Verified during compliance pass; npm test and npm run build pass.
Done: favorites remove controls are visible on touch and keyboard-focusable with focus-visible opacity/ring styles. Verified npm test and npm run build pass.
Done: added password reset token model/migration, request/confirm service, API routes, auth UI pages, login link, unit/route/smoke coverage. Verified npm test and npm run build pass.
Done: completed and verified the first production-hardening task batch tracked under this epic; all child issues are closed and exported.
Public offers accessible without auth; protected actions (favorite, redeem, groups, subscription) trigger auth prompt with redirect back. Groups redirect param fixed. Build/tests green.
Home page renders NearYouSection before auth; NearbyOffers also visible on /offers. City-aware geolocation fetch. Build/tests green.
Offer API supports activeNow query param and /offers page has Сейчас chip; schedule-aware filtering uses Moscow time. Build/tests green.

Offer API supports benefitType filter; /offers page shows benefit-type chips (percent, fixed amount, fixed price, free item, bundle, mystery bag). Existing smoke tests cover route exports. Build/tests green.
OfferCard and OfferDetailClient display estimated ruble savings when calculable (FIXED_AMOUNT, MYSTERY_BAG). Added tests/unit/offer-utils.test.ts covering savings logic. Build/tests green.

OfferCard and OfferDetailClient show verified badge, average rating, review count, and redemption count. API computes avgRating and _count redemptions/reviews. Missing data degrades gracefully. Build/tests green.

Place detail and OfferCard/OfferDetailClient have Построить маршрут links using buildYandexMapsRouteUrl. URL coordinates and address are encoded safely. Added tests/unit/offer-utils.test.ts covering URL builder. Build/tests green.

City selection implemented: CitySelector loads cities from /api/public/cities, persists choice to localStorage, syncs with URL, and is used by home badge, /offers feed, and NearYouSection. District selection deferred (no district model/endpoint yet) — will file a follow-up issue for district filtering. Build/tests green.
